name: Mandiant Advantage Threat Intelligence
description: Premium threat intelligence from Mandiant (Google) for indicators, threat actors, campaigns, vulnerabilities, malware families, and reports

integration_id_config.description: Unique identifier for this Mandiant TI integration instance

api_key.description: Mandiant Threat Intelligence API Key (used as OAuth2 client ID)

secret_key.description: Mandiant Threat Intelligence API Secret Key (used as OAuth2 client secret)

base_url.description: Base URL for the Mandiant Threat Intelligence API

verify_ssl.description: Verify SSL certificates for API connections

actions.name: Health Check
actions.description: Verify connectivity to Mandiant TI API and validate credentials

actions.name: Lookup Indicator
actions.description: Retrieve indicator information for an IP, domain, hash, or URL including confidence score, categories, attributed associations, and related reports

indicator.description: Indicator value to look up (IP, domain, hash, or URL)

actions.name: Lookup Threat Actor
actions.description: Retrieve threat actor information including motivations, tools, malware, targeted industries, locations, reports, and campaigns

threat_actor.description: Threat actor name or ID to look up (e.g., APT29)

actions.name: Lookup Vulnerability
actions.description: Retrieve vulnerability (CVE) information from Mandiant TI including risk rating and exploitation details

vulnerability.description: Vulnerability identifier to look up (e.g., CVE-2021-44228)

actions.name: Lookup Malware Family
actions.description: Retrieve malware family information including associated reports and campaigns

malware_family.description: Malware family name or ID to look up

actions.name: Lookup Campaign
actions.description: Retrieve campaign information including actors, malware, tools, industries, and associated reports

campaign.description: Campaign name or ID to look up

actions.name: Search Mandiant TI
actions.description: Search Mandiant Threat Intelligence for a given query string with automatic pagination

actions.name: Lookup Report
actions.description: Retrieve a single report in HTML format from Mandiant TI

actions.name: List Reports
actions.description: Retrieve a list of reports from Mandiant TI within a time window, optionally filtered by report type

days.description: Number of days to look back for reports (default: 7)

report_type.description: Optional filter by report type (e.g., ACTOR, MALWARE, INDUSTRY)
